CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Opens EPUB files in Image Viewer instead of Text Viewer.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Open in Image Viewer

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Follow the display order specified in the Epub file when opening the Epub file in the Imaeg Viewer.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Image Viewer Display Order

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Use the cover image specified in the EPUB file as the thumbnail on the File List.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Use cover image as thumbnail

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Display the EPUB xhtml file in WebView (it will take some time to load as it will be displayed in a web browser)
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Use a WebView-based EPUB viewer

PreferenceCategory.android:title: WebView-based EPUB viewer settings (* indicates settings common to text viewer settings)

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: This feature becomes effective after closing the EPUB viewer display screen.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Hide the notification area.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: This feature becomes effective after closing the EPUB viewer display screen.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Do not put to sleep

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: This feature becomes effective after closing the EPUB viewer display screen.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Do not use cache

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box if the viewer freezes when closing the screen or resuming from standby mode using the home button.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Return to list view if screen goes behind other screens *

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Display a confirmation message when closing the screen using the back button.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Click the back button to confirm. *

src.comitton.config.OperationPreference.android:dialogMessage: Please select the tap position for turning the page. (<: Next page, >: Previous page)）
src.comitton.config.OperationPreference.android:title: Tap position pattern *

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Checking this box will move you to the next page on the left and the previous page on the right.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Reversing tap operations *

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Vibration is controlled by manipulating and selecting images.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable vibration *

ListPreference.android:dialogTitle: Page turning using the volume buttons
ListPreference.android:title: Page turning using the volume buttons *

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Tap to scroll.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Scrolling by tapping *

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Turn pages by flicking.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Turn pages with a flick *

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Page turning only occurs when the flick is initiated from the edge of the page.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Flick from the edge of the page *

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Checking this box will make the right arrow key move to the previous page.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Swap left and right key operations *

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Assign actions to the four corners and edges, which are designated as tap areas.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box to navigate to the previous or next file in the list when you reach the end of the page while turning pages.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Sort filenames that open at the edge of the page *

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box to disable the first/last buttons.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Disable the start/end buttons at the bottom of the screen. *

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box if you do not want to display the top and bottom headers/footers.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Do not display header/footer

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box to override the text color.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Force the text color to be set.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box to override the text background color.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Force the text background color to be set.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box if you want to change the text display area (this may cause layout issues).
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Vary the dot pitch scaling factor of the text.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box to display a border around the main text area.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Display an outline in the main text.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box to add an option to the pull-down menu settings for switching the display from vertical to horizontal.\n*The pull-down menu appears for vertically oriented EPUB files.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable horizontal text display

src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubFontBody.android:dialogMessage: Select the font size for the main text.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubFontBody.android:dialogTitle: Font scaling for the main text
src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubFontBody.android:title: Font scaling for the main text

src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubFontText.android:dialogMessage: Select the text dot pitch scaling factor.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubFontText.android:title: Text dot pitch scaling

src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubFontInfo.android:dialogMessage: Select the font size for the header/footer.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubFontInfo.android:title: Header/footer font size

src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubMarginWS.android:dialogMessage: Select the left and right margin sizes.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubMarginWS.android:title: Left and right margin size

src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubMarginHS.android:dialogMessage: Select the top and bottom margin size.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.EpubMarginHS.android:title: Top and bottom margin size
